landing.heroTitle: Healthcare that watches over your patients
landing.heroDesc: CARENETRA uses AI agents to monitor patients 24/7, enabling proactive care, timely alerts, and better outcomes.

features.title: Everything you need for modern care

ai.title: AI-Powered Monitoring
ai.desc: Intelligent agents track patient health 24/7 and flag concerns automatically.

vitals.title: Real-Time Vitals
vitals.desc: Live dashboards with health metrics, risk scores, and trend analysis.

alerts.title: Emergency Alerts
alerts.desc: Instant notifications when critical thresholds are breached.

meds.title: Medication Tracking
meds.desc: Automated reminders and adherence monitoring for every patient.

checkins.title: Daily Check-ins
checkins.desc: Voice and text-based check-ins to capture patient well-being.

connect.title: Doctor-Patient Connect
connect.desc: Seamless communication between care teams and patients.

step1.title: Patient Enrolls
step1.desc: Patients register and receive a unique ID for their care journey.

step2.title: Doctor Creates Course
step2.desc: Doctors set up personalized medical courses with medications and schedules.

step3.title: AI Monitors Daily
step3.desc: Our agent conducts daily check-ins and monitors all health data.

step4.title: Alerts & Action
step4.desc: Critical changes trigger instant alerts for immediate medical response.

cta.title: Ready to transform patient care?
cta.desc: Join thousands of healthcare providers using CARENETRA to deliver proactive, AI-powered care.

chat.welcome: Welcome to CARA, your health companion
chat.sessionStarted: Conversation started. How are you feeling today?
chat.nudgeTitle: CARA has a check-in waiting for you
chat.woundDesc: Let AI analyze a quick snapshot

patient.shareId: Share your Patient ID with your doctor.

doctorDashboard.title: Patient Overview
doctorDashboard.askPatientShare: Ask the patient to share their ID from their dashboard.
doctorDashboard.typeMessage: Type a message for the patient...

volunteerDashboard.title: Volunteer Dashboard
volunteerDashboard.noActiveAlerts: No active alerts in your area
volunteerDashboard.refreshesAutomatically: This page refreshes automatically every 10 seconds.
volunteerDashboard.youAreResponding: ✓ You are responding to this alert
volunteerDashboard.hwStep1: 🔔 When a patient's phone detects a high-impact event, you receive an SMS alert.
volunteerDashboard.hwStep2: 📍 Tap "Open in Maps" to navigate to their last known GPS location.
volunteerDashboard.hwStep3: 🏃 Tap "I'm Responding" to let the system know help is coming — the patient and other volunteers will see your confirmation.
volunteerDashboard.hwStep4: 🟢 Set yourself "Off duty" when you're unavailable to stop receiving alerts.
